sentences.translation: Karim je izgubio telefon u ulici.
sentences.translationEn: Karim lost his phone in the street.

sentences.arabic: رَجَعَ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ الَّذِي كَانَ فِيهِ لَكِنَّهُ لَمْ يَجِدْهُ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se na mjesto gdje je bio ali ga nije našao.
sentences.translationEn: He returned to the place where he was but did not find it.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ النَّاسَ مِنْ حَوْلِهِ فَأَخْبَرَهُ رَجُلٌ أَنَّهُ وَجَدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je ljude oko sebe i jedan čovjek mu je rekao da ga je pronašao.
sentences.translationEn: He asked people around him and a man told him he found it.

sentences.arabic: أَعَادَهُ إِلَيْهِ وَفَرِحَ كَرِيمٌ وَشَكَرَهُ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Vratio mu ga je i Karim se obradovao i puno mu zahvalio.
sentences.translationEn: He returned it to him and Karim was happy and thanked him a lot.
